installCommand: cd ../.. && corepack enable pnpm && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

headers.value: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; object-src 'none'; img-src 'self' data: https: http:; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' https:; upgrade-insecure-requests
